name: ima2-gen
description: Local OAuth image generation studio with classic and node workflows

scripts.prepublishOnly: npm test && npm run build && npm run test:package-install && npm run lint:pkg
scripts.lint:pkg: node -e "const p=require('./package.json'); const req=['name','version','bin']; for(const k of req){if(!p[k])throw new Error('missing '+k)} const mustInclude=['bin/','lib/','routes/','server.js']; for(const f of mustInclude){if(!p.files.includes(f))throw new Error('files[] must include '+f)}"
scripts.release:patch: npm version patch && npm publish && git push origin main --tags
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor && npm publish && git push origin main --tags
scripts.release:major: npm version major && npm publish && git push origin main --tags
